description.value:
You grab hold of your enemy, furious slamming them into the ground repeatedly.

Make a grapple check against a creature you can reach. On a success, you grab ahold of their leg and proceed to slam them into the ground several times, forcing the grappled creature to make a Constitution Saving Throw taking your [Unarmed Damage Die] times 4 in damage, they take half damage on a success. Regardless of result, you create 15 feet of difficult terrain directly under you and release the grapple on the creature, moving them to a space of your choice within 5 feet of you.

If this jutsu is used as a Finisher, you do the usual effects but instead you deal your [Unarmed Damage] + your Taijutsu Modifier, multiplying that result by 4 and you give yourself 1 rank of Berserk. The maximum taijutsu modifier you can benefit from with this jutsu is +5.

At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If the jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, the Finisher of this jutsu allows you to roll your Unarmed Damage twice, taking the higher result.. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, you Daze a creature on a failure. Additionally, the non finisher of this jutsu gives you 1 rank of Berserk and the Finisher gives you 2 ranks of Berserk. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank or higher, the Finisher of this jutsu instead deals your unarmed damage times 5.
